allow: Bash(ssh admin@192.168.0.177 "docker exec n8n-postgres psql -U agro_user -d agro_iot -c '\\dt'")
Bash(ssh admin@192.168.0.177 "docker exec n8n-postgres psql -U agro_user -d agro_iot -c 'SELECT id, device_id, received_at, raw_data FROM measurements ORDER BY received_at DESC LIMIT 5;'")

Bash(ssh admin@192.168.0.177 "docker exec n8n-postgres psql -U agro_user -d agro_iot -c \\"SELECT id, received_at, raw_data FROM measurements WHERE device_id=11 ORDER BY received_at DESC LIMIT 20;\\"")
Bash(ssh admin@192.168.0.177 "docker exec n8n-postgres psql -U agro_user -d agro_iot -c \\"SELECT * FROM device_field_mapping WHERE device_id=11;\\"")
Bash(ssh admin@192.168.0.177 "docker exec n8n-postgres psql -U n8n -d n8n -c \\"SELECT id, name, active FROM workflow_entity ORDER BY id;\\" 2>/dev/null || echo 'no access'")
Bash(ssh admin@192.168.0.177 "docker exec n8n-postgres psql -U agro_user -d agro_iot -c '\\dt device_events'")
Bash(ssh admin@192.168.0.177 "docker exec n8n-postgres psql -U agro_user -d agro_iot -c 'SELECT * FROM device_events ORDER BY received_at DESC LIMIT 10;'")
